description: Product Description Features AYBUY girls light up tutu skirt, the perfect dress to make a statement at any event. This LED tulle tutu skirt is designed to add a touch of magic to your outfit. Made with high-quality materials, it is comfortable to wear and built to last, can be matched at will. A variety of color options to meet the needs of different occasions. Package Included: 1 x Girls LED Tutu Skirt Notes: 1.Avoid direct contact with heat or expose under the sun. 2.Due to the influence of shooting lighting, there may be color difference. Please refer to the actual product received.
